name: pgedge-postgres-mcp-server-and-natural-language-agent
description: The pgEdge Postgres Model Context Protocol (MCP) server enables SQL queries against PostgreSQL databases through MCP-compatible clients like Claude Desktop. The Natural Language Agent provides supporting functionality that allows you to use natural language to form SQL queries.
